text: Hello? Hello? Good afternoon, this is Jacob. So, I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Arkansas State Relief Program. So, have you received any notification about these benefits yet? I don't have medicine. Sorry, but you don't seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
